problems: Headline doesn't explain what makes Nova Landscaping different.
CTA 'Contact us' is buried below the fold.
Mobile layout feels heavy with dense body text.
money_impact: Lower conversion on first visit due to unclear messaging.
Fewer leads generated because the CTA is not immediately visible.
Engagement loss from potential customers overwhelmed by text.
